sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 5:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 5:1
items.html: The breaching of the Parsa implies the annulment of the boundary in it, which separates Keter and Hochma from Bina and ZON inside the degree. Through the breaching, Bina and ZON return to the degree as in the beginning. (Part 6, Item 15)
